name: The Factions
postTalk: Amidst the silent rows of polished VIP emergency pods, a heavy tension hangs over the stark yellow safety lines etched into the platform floor.
The arrogance of the elite seeking escape clashes violently with the desperation of the Resistance, who must seize them as hostages to bargain with the Reaper.

vip_scorn: Arka: "Ignorant mortals, how dare you stand in our way?"
Arka: "You are not even worthy of my shadow."
res_demand_kane: Kane: "We seek no more blood. But for a bargain with the Reaper, you as a 'tool' are a necessary sacrifice."
Kane: "Come quietly as hostages if you wish to live. We have no other choice."
res_demand_ren: Ren: "Captain Kane is gone, but our goal remains. We must offer them to the Reaper to bring our comrades back."
Ren: "Drop your weapons. If you resist, we cannot guarantee the hostage's safety."

help_call_vip: Arka: "Wanderer! These savages seek to take us hostage. Strike them down!"
help_call_res: {{name}}: "You must be aware of his tyranny. Cooperate with the Resistance."

results.resistance: A wise choice, Wanderer. Now, let us conclude this deal with the Reaper together.
results.vip: It seems there are tiers even among the lowly. A discerning eye, indeed.
results.kill_all: You're insane... Do you intend to make enemies of us all?

resistance: The golden shuttle lies crushed, and Arka's divine power has been shattered.
The Resistance disappears into the shadows with their hostages. You have played your part in offering a tragic sacrifice for the bargain with the Reaper.
vip: The bodies of the rebels pile up over the yellow safety lines. Arka wipes away the blood with a cold gaze.
Order is preserved, and the VIP has escaped safely. In your hand lies the cold reward tossed to you by the elite.
kill_all: No breath remains on the platform. Only the blare of the emergency alarm fills the silence.
Neither order nor liberation remains. You have simply erased every life that stood in your path. Only the Reaper will be satisfied with this grim outcome.
